finding_results.notes: Rebuilt Priya's confrontation from two clean mini-speeches into shorter situational turns with concrete charges. Added three visible pressure marks: self-correction at line 107 ('I could not —' restart), concrete stake intrusion at line 119 (mother's chemo, visa dependency), and restart at line 119 ('And I needed — I needed'). Priya interrupts Noor at line 123. Removed narrator stage-direction: 'Public Priya has arrived, all careful syntax and controlled volume,' 'The break comes in the middle of the last clause,' 'Recognition hardens on Priya's face... Just a fixed point. Now that point is gone,' and 'For a second Noor sees kinship there.' Replaced totalizing thesis-speech ('you are asking me to trust the judgment of a person who chose her publication over the truth') and mic-drop closer ('Everything you do bends toward protecting your position. That is what the emails say.') with shorter concrete charges and Priya's interruption of Noor. Priya's formal register and low contraction level preserved throughout ('I could not,' 'I do not have'). Noor's high contraction level maintained ('doesn't,' 'don't').

summary: Revised the Priya confrontation scene (lines 107-129) to fix composed-diagnosis dialogue. Broke thesis-speech into shorter situational turns tied to Priya's concrete stakes (mother in chemo, visa dependency, lack of room to refuse). Added self-corrections and restarts as visible pressure marks per Priya's style-bible stress profile. Removed five instances of narrator commentary that told the reader which moments landed or labeled the register. Replaced totalizing character diagnosis and aphoristic closer with concrete charges and a sharp interruption. Preserved the contempt and loss-of-trust dynamic, Priya's formal register, and the scene's function as the chapter's emotional pivot without any line functioning as a mic-drop summary of Noor's character.
